details.test: Task 1: Find Karnataka workshop (15+ days, Jun-Sep 2025) and open details
Task 2: Select highest subsidy scheme (>30%) for individual weavers and open details
Task 3: Compare top 3 Odisha clusters (>=200 looms) by number of weavers
Task 4: Access handloom export statistics 2018-2022 and download CSV
Task 5: Find Weavers Service Centre in Gaya, Bihar and access map view
Task 6: Locate Nov 2025 Delhi exhibition with stall booking and add to calendar
Task 7: Submit high-priority grievance for yarn supply delay
Task 8: Register for English marketing/e-commerce webinar (>=90 minutes)
Task 9: Open Handloom Mark co-operative guidelines and select highest fee category
